mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JOB_CONTACT ( CONTACT_ID, RECEIVER_ID, SEEK_ID, CONTACT_TITLE, COMPANY_INFO, JOB_INFO, CONTACT_CONTENT, FILE_ORG_NAME, FILE_SAVED_NAME, FILE_PATH, READ_YN, SENDER_ID, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_JOB_CONTACT.NEXTVAL, #{receiverId}, #{seekId}, #{contactTitle}, #{companyInfo}, #{jobInfo}, #{contactContent}, #{fileOrgName}, #{fileSavedName}, #{filePath}, 'N', #{senderId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CONTACT_ID AS contactId, RECEIVER_ID AS receiverId, SEEK_ID AS seekId, CONTACT_TITLE AS contactTitle, COMPANY_INFO AS companyInfo, JOB_INFO AS jobInfo, CONTACT_CONTENT AS contactContent, FILE_ORG_NAME AS fileOrgName, FILE_SAVED_NAME AS fileSavedName, FILE_PATH AS filePath, READ_YN AS readYn, SENDER_ID AS senderId, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, READ_AT AS readAt FROM JOB_CONTACT WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{receiverId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT CONTACT_ID AS contactId, RECEIVER_ID AS receiverId, SEEK_ID AS seekId, CONTACT_TITLE AS contactTitle, COMPANY_INFO AS companyInfo, JOB_INFO AS jobInfo, CONTACT_CONTENT AS contactContent, FILE_ORG_NAME AS fileOrgName, FILE_SAVED_NAME AS fileSavedName, FILE_PATH AS filePath, READ_YN AS readYn, SENDER_ID AS senderId, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, READ_AT AS readAt FROM JOB_CONTACT WHERE CONTACT_ID = #{contactId}
mapper.update: UPDATE JOB_CONTACT SET READ_YN = 'Y', READ_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CONTACT_ID = #{contactId} AND READ_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOB_CONTACT WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{receiverId} AND READ_YN = 'N'
